title: Dreamy Smoky American Chicken Wrap
description: A low-glycemic, smoky chicken wrap featuring almonds and wrapped in a lotus leaf, perfect for a sick day pick-me-up
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to 375 degrees Fahrenheit
In a bowl, mix together chicken, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper
Grill the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165 degrees Fahrenheit
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing it into thin strips
In a separate bowl, mix together mayonnaise, diced celery, and diced apple
Add the sliced chicken to the bowl and stir until the chicken is well coated
Spoon about 1/2 cup of the chicken mixture onto the center of a lotus leaf wrap
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly
